case_title: AIRCO COMMERCIAL SERVICES, INC VS. HOLIDAY INN EXPRESS HOTEL SUITES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AIRCO COMMERCIAL SERVICES, INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $95.00) SERVED FEB-01-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOLIDAY INN EXPRESS HOTEL SUITES AGENT OF SERVICE SAJEET T DESAI ESQ
CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFT.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,481.00 FILED BY AIRCO COMMERCIAL SERVICES, INC AS TO DEFENDANT HOLIDAY INN EXPRESS HOTEL SUITES AGENT OF SERVICE SAJEET T DESAI ESQ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-17-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506).
